response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** InfiniteScrollFeed.jsx
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Auditory

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 2 |
| MAJOR | 3 |
| MINOR | 1 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None - All three escalated perspectives have findings

### Perspectives With Findings - Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- [Keyboard trap in infinite scroll] - Keyboard Motor - CRITICAL - 2.1.2 Keyboard Accessible
- [Dynamic content shifts during reading] - Cognitive Neurodivergent - MAJOR - 2.2.1 Timeouts
- [Missing position indicator] - Cognitive Neurodivergent - MAJOR - 2.4.8 Location

**UX Design**
- [No "Load more" button alternative] - Keyboard Motor - CRITICAL - 2.1.2 Keyboard Accessible
- [No end-of-feed indicator] - Cognitive Neurodivergent - MAJOR - 2.4.5 Multiple Ways

**Content Author**
- [Empty alt text on decorative images] - Screen Reader Semantic - MINOR - 1.1.1 Non-Text Content

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

- [ ] Are the `aria-label` values on feed cards sufficiently descriptive for screen reader users? (Human verification required - cannot be confirmed from source)

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present - address before shipping)

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: infinite-scroll-keyboard-trap
fingerprint: 3a7d4f8e2c91b0a5
source: perspective-audit Keyboard Motor checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.1.2 Keyboard Accessible
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(f)
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: Component uses IntersectionObserver for infinite scroll but provides no keyboard-accessible "Load more" button (line 17)
reproduction_steps: Tab through feed - cannot reach sentinel element
expected_behavior: Users should be able to trigger content load via keyboard
actual_behavior: No tabbable element to trigger content load
trend: new
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: dynamic-content-shifts
fingerprint: 8b5c3e1d7f2a90c6
source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.2.1 Timeouts
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(c)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: relativeTime() updates every 60s causing layout shifts (line 36-47)
reproduction_steps: Read article while timer updates
expected_behavior: Content should remain stable during reading
actual_behavior: Timestamps shift every minute
trend: new
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: missing-position-indicator
fingerprint: 4d9e2f1c8a7b60d3
source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.4.8 Location
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(m)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: No page numbers/back-to-top in feed-container (line 92-94)
reproduction_steps: Scroll through 50+ items
expected_behavior: Users should know their position in the feed
actual_behavior: No navigational context provided
trend: new
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: screen-reader-alt-text
fingerprint: 7c2e9d1f8a3b60c5
source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.1.1 Non-Text Content
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(i)
severity: MINOR
perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: Images have alt="" but no decorative context is visible (line 112)
reproduction_steps: Review image usage
expected_behavior: Decorative images should have empty alt
actual_behavior: Context not visible to determine if decorative
trend: new
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: infinite-scroll-end-indicator
fingerprint: 2e8f1d3c7a9b60d4
source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.4.5 Multiple Ways
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(l)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: No "End of feed" indicator (line 127)
reproduction_steps: Scroll to bottom
expected_behavior: Users should know when content ends
actual_behavior: Feed appears infinite
trend: new
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
